channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Mavs star Luka Doncic will be out about a month before check on calf injury, AP source says
item.description: A person with knowledge of the injury says Dallas Mavericks superstar Luka Doncic will be out about a month before being re-evaluated for a calf injury sustained in a Christmas Day loss to Minnesota.
item.dc:creator: Schuyler Dixon, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Inman: 49ers’ Alex Barrett appreciating life in NFL
item.description: Alex Barrett, a backup defensive lineman on the 49ers since 2019, honored his late friend while playing Sunday for the first time in four years.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Woolen's late interception seals win as Seahawks beat struggling Bears 6-3 to boost playoff hopes
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Seattle Seahawks made just enough plays to boost their fading playoff hopes by beating the struggling Chicago Bears on Thursday night. Now, they'll be rooting for the Arizona Cardinals to beat the Los Angeles Rams this weekend.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Cole Hutson has 5 assists, defending champion US routs Germany 10-4 in world junior hockey opener
item.description: OTTAWA, Ontario (AP) — Boston University defenseman Cole Hutson had five assists to help the United States open its world junior hockey title defense with a 10-4 victory over Germany on Thursday at Canadian Tire Centre.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: At least 65 million tune in for Netflix NFL Christmas Day games. NBA holiday ratings also skyrocket
item.description: LeBron James and the NBA are going to have make room for the NFL on Christmas. That shouldn't be a problem. Both leagues were winners on Wednesday. Netflix set records as the most-streamed NFL games in U.S. history while the NBA had its best holiday numbers in five years according to Nielsen.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY and TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: 49ers’ Shanahan expects Jake Moody to be his kicker into the future
item.description: Jake Moody slumped after missing time with a high ankle sprain, but coach Kyle Shanahan isn't looking for a new place kicker.
item.dc:creator: Jerry McDonald, The Mercury News

item.title: US Center for SafeSport hired former police officer accused of theft
item.description: The US sex-abuse watchdog has since fired Jason Krasley, who was arrested on suspicion of stealing money confiscated from a drug bust in 2019 in Allentown, Pa.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Detroit Red Wings fire coach Derek Lalonde, name Todd McLellan as his replacement
item.description: The Detroit Red Wings fired coach Derek Lalonde on Thursday and named Todd McLellan as his replacement, a major change by general manager Steve Yzerman more than a third of the way through another disappointing season in the place known as “Hockeytown.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ravens' Lamar Jackson, Derrick Henry refuse to eat Netflix football cake in awkward moment
item.description: Baltimore Ravens stars Lamar Jackson and Derrick Henry refused to eat the Netflix game cake after the team's huge win over the Houston Texans.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Simona Halep withdraws from Australian Open qualifying because of knee and shoulder pain
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Two-time Grand Slam champion Simona Halep pulled out of Australian Open qualifying and a tuneup tournament in Auckland, New Zealand, on Thursday because of pain in her knee and shoulder, the latest interruption of her comeback from a drug suspension.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Wayne Gretzky's wife shares Trump post floating NHL legend as Canadian prime minister
item.description: President-elect Trump floated Wayne Gretzky as the prime minister of Canada on Wednesday, and it appeared the hockey legend's wife was watching as she shared the post on her own social media.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Comanche, defending champion LawConnect lead early in Sydney to Hobart yacht race
item.description: SYDNEY (AP) — Comanche took an eight nautical-mile lead over defending line honors champion and fellow 100-foot super maxi LawConnect early in the Sydney to Hobart yacht race on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: BYU arrives in San Antonio ahead of Alamo Bowl
item.description: SAN ANTONIO, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - The Cougars have arrived in San Antonio for what they hope will be an Alamo Bowl to remember. "Super excited to be down here," said defensive end Tyler Batty.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Caprock Hockey hangs tough with defending State Champion Durango
item.description: In their second-ever varsity home game, the Caprock Eagles once again had a tough test, this time with the defending 4A State Champion Durango Demons.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5
